children.name: 1. Should show login page by default
2. Should toggle between Login and Register modes
3. Should prevent login with empty fields
4. Should show error for invalid credentials
5. Should successfully Register a new user
6. Should display the default starting balance of $1,000
7. Should show correct Account Number in header
8. Should switch to History tab when clicked
9. Should return to Overview when clicking sidebar button
11. Should close modal when clicking Cancel
13. Should prevent transfer if balance is insufficient
14. Should update balance instantly after successful transfer
15. Should add new row to History table after transaction
16. Income/Expense cards should reflect total math
17. Should logout and redirect to login page
18. Should prevent access to /dashboard without token
19. Should persist session on page refresh
POST /auth/register - Should create a new user
POST /auth/login - Should return a token for valid credentials
GET /transactions/history - Should fail without a token
GET /transactions/history - Should return empty array for new user
POST /transactions/transfer - Should fail if receiver does not exist
API-01: Should register a new user and grant $1000
API-02: Should reject registration with an existing email
API-03: Should return a valid JWT token on login
API-04: Should retrieve user profile using valid Bearer token
API-05: Should reject login with incorrect password
API-06: Should reject registration if name is missing
API-07: Should return 401 when accessing /me without a token
API-08: Get Profile with Valid Token
API-02: Fail on Duplicate Email (400 Bad Request)
API-04: Fail on Invalid Email Format
API-09: Verify Account Number is 10 Digits
